title: Coconut Rice
excerpt: Ingredients 1.2 litres cold water 375 ml jasmine rice 45 ml coconut oil 1 x 400 ml tin coconut milk salt to taste 30 – 45 ml (to your taste) toasted whole cumin seeds handful toasted coconut flakes Method Put the water and rice in a pot, bring to the boil and let the rice cook on high …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1.2 litres cold water
  • 375 ml jasmine rice
  • 45 ml coconut oil
  • 1 x 400 ml tin coconut milk
  • salt to taste
  • 30 – 45 ml (to your taste) toasted whole cumin seeds
  • handful toasted coconut flakes

Method

Put the water and rice in a pot, bring to the boil and let the rice cook on high, without a lid, for about 6 – 8 minutes, just until it starts to soften.

Drain the water and put the rice back in the pot. Stir the coconut oil, coconut milk, cumin seeds and salt to taste into the rice, and bring to the boil again. Turn the plate down to the lowest, put the lid on and let
the rice steam until it's cooked and all the liquid has been absorbed.

Remove from the heat and serve with the coconut flakes as garnish.

Serves 4 generous portions.

Easy!
